name: Manner of Death
original_name: พฤติการณ์ที่ตาย
overview: A forensic doctor uncovers a murder disguised as suicide. When threats follow, he joins forces with a mysterious suspect to expose the truth—and stay alive.

trailers.title: Manner of Death | Official Trailer | Are you ready to sacrifice "Love" as a cost? | 亡者之谜 | ENG SUB
